title: Dekton 10/XL Multi-Purpose Professional Latex Coated Working Gloves | Ultimate Protection for DIY & Tradesmen | Ultra Grip Material | CE Cat 2 & EN388 Certified | Ideal for Protection in Various Task

description: From the manufacturer MULTI-PURPOSE GLOVES SIZE 10/XLARGE Ultimate protection. Ideal for DIY, tradesmen and builders where extra protection is required. IDEAL FOR: DIY. Tradesmen. Builders. Where extra protection is required.
